Match_Summary_Notes: Good performance vs Italy with all the shots he faced. He was comfortable on the ball and played good passes to launch counter-attacks. His positioning was good for most shots and he assessed the danger well when receiving the ball, and was able to break the first and second lines of defense many times with his passes. He could've done better while acting as a sweeper because he often hesitated.
Even though he conceded a goal, he didn't do too bad. He didn't face that many shots and could have done better with the goal he conceded. He had a top performance on the ball and as a sweeper.
